preregistration.R1: D_live > B, permutation p<0.1 (else only the linter ships)
preregistration.R5_R6: v4: islands-vs-B isolation + cards-vs-islands split (the referee confound fix)
preregistration.v4_amendment: referee-prescribed BEFORE this run: (a) REPAIR step_mult wired into the reject adaptation (v3 shipped it as dead code), (b) joint_defend deduped in the thompson menu, (c) E_islands arm added (portfolio without cards), (d) 20 seeds, (e) DE-TUNED incumbent (anchor levels) for genuine frontier headroom - the v3 certified-incumbent run measured polish-regime saturation (90% dominated rejections) and is archived as _v3_certified_incumbent
preregistration.scope: procedural skeleton only; LLM writer not in this A/B

verdict: R1 FAIL (p=0.991, delta=-1.10): at this scale hypothesis-conditioning is THEATER per the preregistration - only the linter ships; the LLM layer needs a different lever or a bigger budget.

post_review.status: CONFIRMED_NARROWED (two-direction referee, 3 lenses + judge; full text exp_hlmem_ab_v4_review.json)
post_review.corrected_verdict: PREREGISTERED READ = WELL-POWERED NULL: R1 D_live-B = -1.1 (p(D>B)=0.991, power 0.87) - no conditioning component ships per prereg. The printed 'THEATER' template sentence is replaced by the narrowed post-hoc story: (1) the C deficit (-1.7, sign-flip p=0.0004, survives x6 Bonferroni) localizes to ONE wire - REPAIR's fixed step_mult 1.6 on the frontier bars keeps steps above the narrow accept band (accepted moves ~0.03-0.06); the prefer/selection channel is harmless-to-helpful (C_prefer_only 4.75 >= B 4.50). (2) CARDS-HARM RETRACTED: R6 was an arm-ladder confound (use_dev ON for D, OFF for E; D_nostep counterfactual 4.25 = neutral) plus D's Thompson menu appended joint_defend on every island. (3) Islands = directional-only (E-B -0.55, p~0.11; the patience counter counts FREE queries contrary to its docstring - the documented design was never tested). (4) Linter UNEXERCISED (6 refusals/800), not 'neutral'; it ships on a-priori no-harm only. (5) HORIZON-CONDITIONAL: at budget 80 C-B INVERTS to +1.95 (p=0.018, post-hoc, unreplicated) because B's own 0.6 shrink self-traps below the accept band - neither fixed step policy is adaptive; 'the memory question moves to the LLM-writer level' is FALSIFIED in-distribution: the root cause is REJECTED_NO_FRONTIER_GAIN conflating too-bold (82% of C's frontier rejects) with too-timid (82% of B's) while deviation_report discards the cand info the gate already returns. (6) KT-D read went the WRONG way here (frozen-live -0.45@40, -1.3@80) - do not cite this run for frozen>=live. (7) Wealth endpoint = cost-composition gauge, not corroboration (C/D die at the FREE frontier stage, ending wealthier). Scope: one substrate, one hand-coded repair map, budget 40 preregistered; sd is population sd (~3% understated); CRN pairing bought no variance reduction on key contrasts; unexplained negative cross-arm correlations (corr(D_live,E)=-0.67) flagged as anomaly.
post_review.next_lever: v5 prereg (interpretability/preregistration_hlmem_v5.md): split no_frontier_gain too-bold/too-timid (binary failure side only, hygiene-preserving), baseline step floor/re-expansion, islands patience on PRICED queries, horizons 40 AND 80 both preregistered.
